steps.title: Focus on the requested difference
steps.content: The notes give one clear difference between the fox species: fennec foxes have sixty-four chromosomes, while red foxes have thirty-four.

steps.title: Require both numbers
steps.content: Choice A discusses genes in fennec fox chromosomes without comparing the species. Choice C states a shared feature. Choice D gives only the red fox's count. The remaining sentence directly contrasts sixty-four chromosomes with thirty-four. The answer is B.
